title: Murder of CM Suvendu Adhikari's PA: Kolkata court sends accused to 13-day police custody
description: A court in West Bengal's Barasat on Monday remanded three men arrested in connection with the murder of Chandranath Rath, former Personal Assistant (PA) and close aide of West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari, to 13 days of police custody.The Court sent them to custody till May 24 after a Special Investigation Team (SIT) informed that custodial interrogation of the accused was necessary to uncover the “larger conspiracy” behind the killing and identify the local masterminds
